notes:
Achievements are broken in the Linux version, and when I tried to force the Windows version, it didn't even start and instead gave me an error about being unable to load an icon (that's right there). Other than that, the Linux version works, except that the intro is in Chinese. The dev is currently trying to fix it, but it's been a week with little to no improvements.

It might be worth noting that the game has no cloud save, and the Linux version dumps a lot of files in a folder with the game's ID in .config, but I haven't been able to identify a savegame.
Linux version has been fixed and works well
